race.comment: KINGS DOMAIN (7) ran well on debut last start to finish third over 1400m at Cranbourne in a tougher race. Will benefit from that experience so he will be hard to beat up to a more suitable trip from a good draw. NARAGHI (14) resumed from a spell last start with a sound second over 1600m at Pakenham after being in the firing line on the corner. Has the talent to find winning ways, just needs to find the right passage from a terrible alley. SO VOGUE (3) finished second last start when fresh from a spell over 1590m at this track to make it three minor placings from seven runs. Has been in the frame at both appearances at this course. Has to be respected. KIRKHOEPASSE (12) was 4.5 lengths from the winner in seventh over 1600m at Sandown-Hillside last time following a minor placing on debut the run before. Likely improver.
